name: Open Maps
description: Launch Maps if it is not already running
triggers: When Maps is not yet open

name: Search the address
description: Maps is open with its search field: type the address and search
triggers: When Maps is open and its search field is visible
actions: Click the search field in Maps
Type '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20500' into the search field
Press Enter to run the search

name: Open directions
description: A searched place with a Directions button is visible: open directions
triggers: When a searched location is shown and its Directions button is visible
actions: Click the Directions button for the searched location
